overall.description: Gameplay footage from Horizon Forbidden West showing the protagonist Aloy wading through a shallow river. The scene transitions from a rocky canyon environment to a lush tropical palm grove under bright midday sun with dynamic water physics and volumetric lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky canyon river with arid banks

agents.ego_description: wading steadily through shallow river water, moving away from rocky canyon walls toward open tropical areas

entered.detail: tall reddish-brown rock formation rising steeply from the riverbank
sparse deciduous trees and bushes on the right riverbank
clear shallow water with visible ripples and reflections
hazy mountain range visible in the background

segments.scene_description: The character wades through a shallow river in a canyon environment, with steep rocky walls on the left and scattered vegetation on the right. The water creates realistic ripples and splashes as the character moves forward under bright sunlight.

events.description: river environment transitions from rocky canyon to tropical palm grove with sandy banks

agents.ego_description: continuing to wade through the river as the surroundings become increasingly tropical with dense palm trees

entered.detail: tall palm trees with green fronds lining the left riverbank
dense cluster of palm trees on the right side creating a tropical canopy
sandy shoreline replacing the previous rocky terrain

segments.scene_description: The river transitions into a tropical environment with dense palm trees lining both banks. The sandy shores replace the rocky canyon walls as the character continues wading through the sunlit water toward a more lush, jungle-like area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a shallow river that transforms from a rugged rocky canyon into a lush tropical grove. It begins with the character wading through clear water under bright sunlight, flanked by steep rocky walls and scattered vegetation. As the character moves forward, the river ripples and splashes, and the stark canyon walls gradually give way to soft sandy shores. The scene then opens into a dense tropical environment where towering palm trees line both banks, shifting the landscape toward a vibrant, jungle-like atmosphere.
